svg.title: Bella Cucina AI Concierge — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing the browser UI, agent loop, tool registry, and in-memory data store for the Bella Cucina restaurant chatbot.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the sidebar order panel in Bella Cucina')
